_comment: Default marketing valuation rates + AppSumo reach figures. Editable per engagement (M1). Revenue-scaled channels (per marketing head, Jun 2026): value = pctOfNetRevenue × net revenue, clamped to [minValue, maxValue]. PDP Video + Affiliate use the 15% midpoint of the quoted 10-20% driver; Launch Email uses 25% so it stays the highest-value perk — tune pctOfNetRevenue to adjust. defaultValue is the fallback when no pct is set.

launchEmail.label: Launch Email Campaign
launchEmail.copy: Featured send to 1M+ subscribers — typically the highest-value placement

pdpVideo.label: PDP Video
pdpVideo.copy: Professional product video on your deal page — a 10–20% conversion lift

affiliateNetwork.label: Affiliate Network
affiliateNetwork.copy: 20,000+ affiliates create reviews, blogs & tutorials — ~10–20% of deal revenue when pushed

seoOrganic.label: SEO & Organic Traffic
seoOrganic.copy: Page-1 ranking for review & alternative searches
